LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS BAC HOME LOANS SERVICING, LP DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION (NEGLIGENCE) BECAUSE A FINANCIAL INSTITUTION OWES NO DUTY OF CARE TO A BORROWER WHEN ITS INVOLVEMENT DOES NOT EXCEED THE SCOPE OF ITS CONVENTIONAL ROLE AS A MERE LENDER. NYMARK VS. HEART FED. SAVING & LOAN ASSN. (1991) 231 CAL.APP.3RD 1089. REMAINING CAUSES OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION (BREACH OF CONTRACT) AS TO ALLEGED WRITTEN AND/OR IMPLIED CONTRACT, PLAINTIFFS MUST PLEAD THE TERMS OF THE CONTRACT AND SPECIFY WHICH TERMS WERE VIOLATED AND HOW. PLAINTIFFS MUST ALLEGE AN ORAL AGREEMENT THAT IS NOT BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF FRAUDS. CC SECTION 1624(3). THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION (B&P 17200), 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION (FRAUD), AND 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION (FRAUD), PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FRAUD WITH SPECIFICITY (HOW, WHAT, WHEN, WHERE, WHO MADE THE REPRESENTATIONS AND ON WHAT AUTHORITY.) SEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION (BREACH OF DUTY OF GOOD FAITH), IMPLIED COVENANT DOES NOT IMPOSE AN AFFIRMATIVE DUTY ON DEFENDANT TO REFRAIN FROM ENFORCING RIGHTS EXPRESSLY GIVEN UNDER THE CONTRACT. NO FIDUCIARY DUTY OWED. EIGHTH CAUSE OF ACTION (CC SEC. 2923.5), UNCLEAR WHETHER PRIVATE RIGHT OF ACTION EXISTS. HOWEVER, CODE SECTION DOES NOT REQUIRE MODIFICATION OF LOAN. PLAINTIFFS DO NOT ALLEGE WHETHER THEY WERE CONTACTED OR NOT PRIOR TO THE COMMENCEMENT OF THE FORECLOSURE PROCEEDINGS. (MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-26-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS BAC HOME LOANS SERVICING, LP DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Demurrer sustained without leave to amend as to 2nd cause of action (negligence) because a financial institution owes no duty of care to a borrower when its involvement does not exceed the scope of its conventional role as a mere lender. Nymark vs. Heart Fed. Saving & Loan Assn. (1991) 231 Cal.App.3rd 1089. Remaining causes of action sustained with 10 days leave to amend. 1st cause of action (breach of contract) as to alleged written and/or implied contract, plaintiffs must plead the terms of the contract and specify which terms were violated and how. Plaintiffs must allege an oral agreement that is not barred by the statute of frauds. CC section 1624(3). Third cause of action (B&P 17200), 5th cause of action (fraud), and 6th cause of action (fraud), plaintiff must plead fraud with specificity (how, what, when, where, who made the representations and on what authority.) Seventh cause of action (breach of duty of good faith), implied covenant does not impose an affirmative duty on defendant to refrain from enforcing rights expressly given under the contract. No fiduciary duty owed. Eighth cause of action (CC Sec. 2923.5), unclear whether private right of action exists. However, code section does not require modification of loan. Plaintiffs do not allege whether they were contacted or not prior to the commencement of the foreclosure proceedings. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-10-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend. Plaintiffs do not allege that defendant breached the loan agreement and allege no basis for a breach of the duty of good faith and fair dealing. Plaintiffs are granted leave to amend their complaint to allege additional causes of action supported by a legal and factual basis. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
